$ switchyard --data-dir <DATA_DIR> --endpoint unix://<DATA_DIR>/switchyardd.sock --no-color --format json ui missing
exit: 0
stdout:
UI development tools

Usage:
  switchyard ui [command]

Available Commands:
  dev         Start the Vite dev server proxied to switchyardd

Flags:
  -h, --help   help for ui

Global Flags:
      --data-dir string    data directory (default "<DEFAULT_DATA_DIR>")
      --endpoint string    API endpoint (unix:///path or tcp://host:port)
      --format string      auto|table|json|yaml (default "auto")
      --log-level string   error|warn|info|debug (default "warn")
      --no-color           disable ANSI color
  -v, --verbose            --log-level=debug shortcut

Use "switchyard ui [command] --help" for more information about a command.
stderr:
